name: Dino Quake
author: Poki
description: Dino Quake is a colorful and retro arcade-platform game, where the player takes on the role of a little dinosaur trying to make its way to the top. Jump through the levels, dodge hits and knock out your enemies by shooting a quake at them. Can you survive and climb to the very peak? How to play Dino Quake? Single player or Player 1 Walking: A for left and D for right Jumping: W Dropping down: S Shooting a quake: Spacebar Player 2 Walking: ArrowLeft for left and ArrowRight for right Jumping: ArrowUp Dropping down: ArrowDown Shooting a quake: ALT/CTRL Shoot enemies to stun them, walk up to them to knock them out! Who created Dino Quake? Dino Quake is created by Neutronized. Check out their other games on Poki: Bufo Merge , Slime Laboratory , Roar Rampage , Slime Laboratory 2 , Snow Tale , Picnic Penguin , Magic Bridge , Lost Yeti , Yokai Dungeon , Mimelet , Drop Wizard Tower , Dyna Boy , Shadow Trick , Double Panda and Slime Pizza ! How can I play Dino Quake for free? You can play Dino Quake for free on Poki. Can I play Dino Quake on mobile devices and desktop? Dino Quake can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Dino Quake with my friend? Yes! Dino Quake has a two-player mode where you can play locally with a friend!
